title: Fix TranslationProvider missing from app root

requirements.summary: Wrap the application root in App.tsx with TranslationProvider to resolve useTranslationContext errors
acceptanceCriteria: The app loads without displaying 'useTranslationContext must be used within TranslationProvider' error
TranslationProvider wraps the component tree at a level that covers all routes and pages
All pages that use useTranslation continue to function correctly with translated strings

file_operations.description: Import TranslationProvider from frontend/src/contexts/TranslationContext.tsx and wrap the existing RouterProvider and its surrounding providers (ThemeProvider, Toaster) with TranslationProvider. Ensure TranslationProvider is placed at a level that covers all child components and routes so that any component using useTranslation can access the translation context without errors.
